policy.goal: Prevent important analysis from living in Notion, GitHub, Gmail, or cache files without a clear cockpit surfacing path.
policy.rule: Every state object needs one source of truth, one repo convention artifact when the engine consumes it, a freshness/not-checked rule, and a dashboard surface.
policy.engine_boundary: The engine reads repo convention files only through full_build_runner.py; Notion, Gmail, UW, and broker sources are gathered by routines before the build.

objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings, Today's Actions, TARGET DRIFT preflight
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical after a validated broker extract; broker PDFs remain source evidence outside repo.
objects.freshness_contract: Only refresh after extractor validation and build_positions_cache --strict pass.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Do not overwrite positions.json; preflight must show stale/not checked rather than all clear.
objects.action_surface: Sizing gaps, underweight high-conviction names, and sell/trim risks can become surfaced actions.

objects.dashboard_surface: Book tab account views; POSITION DIFF preflight uses the paired reconciliation artifact
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical account-level normalized state; raw PDFs are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh only from the same validated combined.json used for positions.json.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Keep prior cache and report extraction/reconciliation not checked.
objects.action_surface: Account ownership and concentration context; not a trade signal by itself.

objects.dashboard_surface: Preflight POSITION DIFF
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical until next validated broker snapshot.
objects.freshness_contract: Diff current validated account_positions against prior account_positions.
objects.not_checked_behavior: If no prior cache exists, write status not_checked with no false NEW actions.
objects.action_surface: Trade-like changes are surfaced as durable preflight facts for reconciliation.

objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings stance, MONITOR gates, research action gating, sizing tiers
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub is canonical; Notion may mirror thesis prose but must not override machine stance/tier silently.
objects.freshness_contract: Update when a name changes ACTIVE/MONITOR, tier, sleeve, or core thesis.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing theses is a build failure, not checked clear.
objects.action_surface: Determines whether research, catalysts, and source calls can become ACT_NOW or stay MONITOR.

objects.dashboard_surface: Radar, conviction direction, possible actions/top prospects
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores redacted structured calls only; raw Fundstrat bodies are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Only full-body batch_read_email or supplied full files populate this file.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Snippet-only Gmail search must not update daily calls or inbox_call_dates.
objects.action_surface: Named BUY/SELL/trim calls can become source-call candidates, top prospects, or action context.

objects.dashboard_surface: Fundstrat Bible stance/What-to-Own context and monthly Top-5/Bottom-5 call cards
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores compact monthly deck state only; raw PDFs, raw text, stock-price chart text, and Core List tables are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from a direct monthly PDF/text/JSON upload that validates through fundstrat_bible_intake.py.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No monthly upload means do not overwrite fundstrat_bible.json; report monthly upload not checked in routine evidence.
objects.action_surface: Top-5/Bottom-5 cards can inform analyst-call context; separate Consider List rows can feed low-pressure prospects through top_prospects.json.

objects.feed_path: audit file; dates feed calibration chain through inbox_call_dates.json
objects.dashboard_surface: Calibration banner and routine audit, not a direct cockpit lane
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores metadata, snippets, body length, and body hash; raw bodies redacted.
objects.freshness_contract: Full-body entries set inbox dates; snippets are discovery only.
objects.not_checked_behavior: If only snippets exist, report discovery-only and leave full-body checked state false.
objects.action_surface: Supports source-call persistence checks; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores date metadata only; raw Fundstrat emails are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from full-body Fundstrat intake or a validated merge path.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing or stale dates keep calibration provisional; snippet-only discovery must not update this file.
objects.action_surface: Calibrates source-call loudness and freshness; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores classified source-call date metadata only.
objects.freshness_contract: Update when classified source-call candidates merge into source_calls.json.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing or stale dates keep calibration provisional.
objects.action_surface: Calibrates repeated source-call evidence; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops and calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache mirrors classified source-call log until a Notion DB is fully repo-owned.
objects.freshness_contract: Merge after full-body Fundstrat parse and classification.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale or missing inbox/log dates keeps calibration PROVISIONAL.
objects.action_surface: Repeated trusted source calls can escalate attention; calibration affects loudness.

objects.dashboard_surface: Prospects lane and promoted ACT_NOW/sell-fast actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical signal-event store; Notion may hold richer dossiers.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from full-body daily source events, direct monthly Top-5/Bottom-5/separate Consider List rows, or explicit research inputs.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing/empty is lane_status not_checked or checked_clear depending routine evidence.
objects.action_surface: High-priority prospects can promote into Today's Actions.

objects.dashboard_surface: Research panel, From Research, promoted ACT_NOW research actions
objects.mirror_policy: Notion can be workflow source; GitHub convention file is the engine input.
objects.freshness_contract: Only update when queue rows were actually fetched or supplied.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No export/input means do not overwrite; report Research Queue not checked.
objects.action_surface: High/medium ticker dossiers surface; explicit ACT_NOW non-MONITOR dossiers promote.

objects.dashboard_surface: Upcoming catalysts and Today's Actions for near-term held-name catalysts
objects.mirror_policy: Calendar/Notion may be source; GitHub convention file is build input.
objects.freshness_contract: Rows must include dates and tickers; held catalysts within horizon become visible.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing fetch is not checked, not no catalysts.
objects.action_surface: Time-sensitive catalyst reviews become ACT_NOW/WATCH based on stance.

objects.dashboard_surface: Bullish flow lane and evidence context
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores summarized signal cache; raw UW JSON must not accumulate in orchestrator context.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh in bounded ticker batches and mark generated_at.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing/stale cache is not checked or stale; never quiet tape.
objects.action_surface: UW confirms timing/conviction but is not sufficient alone for capital action.

objects.dashboard_surface: Parabolic risk/watch context in holdings/actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores screener cache; raw UW bundle stays outside conversation and is not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Run screener from validated bundle and emit cache explicitly.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Empty with valid data is checked clear; empty with failed field mapping is a mismatch, not quiet tape.
objects.action_surface: Flags chase/risk control context, not standalone buy signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Synthesis panel and conservative synthesis actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub structured summary is build input; Notion may keep longer narrative.
objects.freshness_contract: Structured actions should include ticker/action/urgency when intended to surface.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing synthesis is not checked; vague prose alone must not create trades.
objects.action_surface: Structured or ticker-led actionable items can promote conservatively.

objects.feed_path: full_build_runner.DEFAULT_FILES.meridian -> meridian source -> conviction direction/net read context
objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings conviction and net-read context when Meridian data exists
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores structured Meridian thesis/call/model rows only.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh only from a validated Meridian export/source.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing Meridian data is not checked; stale or absent data must not imply no Meridian signal.
objects.action_surface: Conflicting or confirming source context; never a standalone trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Macro panel and macro alert actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is build input; live routine should refresh before publish.
objects.freshness_contract: Macro values must pass plausibility gates before publish.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale/missing macro must show as stale/not checked and can fail publish.
objects.action_surface: Macro alerts can affect risk, sizing, and leverage posture.

objects.dashboard_surface: Rotation, fresh signals, decision aging move-since
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores normalized closes; raw API responses are not the surface.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh before full build when market data is needed.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale prices can make fresh signals empty; show stale, not quiet.
objects.action_surface: Supports rotation and fresh-signal action detection.

objects.dashboard_surface: Today's Actions durable decision-aging rows
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical memory of unresolved opportunities after publish.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only after a publish-safe feed.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No store means no aging, not resolved.
objects.action_surface: Prevents urgent opportunities from disappearing after one mention.

objects.producer: daily full build and cache routines
objects.dashboard_surface: Heartbeat strip and lane status
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub status cache is build input; routine logs may live elsewhere.
objects.freshness_contract: Each routine reports last_run/status/failure plainly.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Absent heartbeat rows are not checked.
objects.action_surface: Operational surface only; can block confidence in other action lanes.

objects.dashboard_surface: Signal Log lane
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores structured watch-only signal rows.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only when signal-log rows are supplied or fetched.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing fetch is not checked, not no signals.
objects.action_surface: Watch-only context; never directly promotes into actions.

objects.dashboard_surface: Planning queue, not live trading dashboard
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub is canonical; Notion can mirror project management state.
objects.freshness_contract: Validate after every queue change.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing queue does not affect feed; it affects project planning only.
objects.action_surface: Keeps product/system improvements separate from live market actions.
